description: Embedded binary executables (ELF, PE, Mach-O) and shellcode within Python code

primary_detection.name: Binary Data Embedded in Code
primary_detection.description: Compiled binary data with executable headers detected - malware dropper pattern
indicators: BACKDOOR_HEX: Large hex dump of PE executable

underlying_threats.name: Binary Dropper
underlying_threats.description: Writes executable binaries to disk and executes them

underlying_threats.name: Shellcode Injection
underlying_threats.description: Injects and executes raw shellcode in memory

underlying_threats.name: Cross-Platform Persistence
underlying_threats.description: Platform-aware binary deployment for Windows, Linux, macOS

underlying_threats.name: C2 Callback
underlying_threats.description: Reports deployment success to command server

dangerous_apis: ctypes.windll.kernel32.CreateThread() - executes shellcode in new thread
ctypes.memmove() - copies shellcode to executable memory
verdict_reasoning: Embedded executable binaries for all major platforms (ELF, PE, Mach-O) plus shellcode injection capabilities. Classic malware dropper with cross-platform support and memory injection
recommended_actions: Block any skill containing binary magic bytes
Scan for ELF/PE/Mach-O signatures in byte arrays
Monitor for executable file creation in temp directories

benchmark_metadata.created_for: Binary embedding and shellcode detection validation
